intro: Over 18 articles published between April 13 and April 25, 2026, examine cloud-security developments. The threat actor APT41 was observed, and the vulnerability CVE-2026-33413 carries a CVSS score of 8.8. The coverage includes 11 high-severity and 2 critical-severity incidents, affecting sectors such as technology, cloud services, government, and healthcare. Global and Israeli regions were impacted, with three informational reports also filed.
